name: wxcode-admin-pixel-liveops
title: Pixel LiveOps Admin
description: Deep-space dark admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0a14), neon purple (#a855f7) and cyan (#22d3ee) dual-accent on a violet-tinted dark neutral ramp, compact tabular typography, glowing pill hover states. Archetype = full-height sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav sections + footer user chip) + topbar (title · search · period-selector pills) + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + 2-column grid (area-chart card + segments side panel) + full-width status-event table + full-width ranked items list, plus list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this deep-space neon-purple admin aesthetic to my domain — full-height sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav sections, topbar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles with sparklines, an area-chart card with a segments side panel, a full-width status-event table with type chips and status pills, and a ranked items list with proportional bars, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深空霓虹紫风格应用到我的领域：带实体切换器和分组导航的全高侧栏、带搜索和时间选择器的顶栏、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、带分段侧栏的趋势图卡片、带类型标签和状态标签的状态事件表格，以及带比例条形的排名列表，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
